title: deschampsia koelerioides
intro: Deschampsia koelerioides, also known as Koeler's hairgrass or mountain hairgrass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Deschampsia koelerioides include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
